user_request: Blessing for the mechanical lock during engagement
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the mechanical lock during engagement

### TOPIC
mechanical lock engagement

### COMPONENT
mechanical lock

### OPERATION
engagement

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- mechanical lock
- engagement

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed Omnissiah, attend this rite of mechanical communion.
First: Anoint the mechanical lock with sacred oils whilst intoning the Litany of Alignment.
Second: Verify the mechanical lock's tolerances through tactile inspection and dimensionometric scrutiny.
Third: Invoke the Machine Spirit of the mechanical lock, guiding its tumblers toward harmonious engagement.
Fourth: Seal the engagement with the Sign of the Cog, that the lock may hold eternal.

user_request: Offer a litany to steady the lasgun before power cell insertion
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Offer a litany to steady the lasgun before power cell insertion

### TOPIC
lasgun power cell insertion

### COMPONENT
lasgun

### OPERATION
power cell insertion

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- lasgun
- power cell insertion

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed are the conduits of righteous fury, O Omnissiah.
First: Purify the lasgun's receptacle through abrasive cleansing and electromagnetic declination.
Second: Chant the Mantra of Resonance whilst aligning the lasgun for power cell insertion with precise mechanicum technique.
Third: Insert the power cell into the lasgun's chamber with reverent deliberation, observing the blessed green luminescence.
Fourth: Consecrate the lasgun anew, that its fury may never waver.

user_request: Prayer for sterilization of the surgical servitor
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Prayer for sterilization of the surgical servitor

### TOPIC
surgical servitor sterilization

### COMPONENT
surgical servitor

### OPERATION
sterilization

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- surgical servitor
- sterilization

### PRAYER
prayer:
O Machine Spirit of mercy and precision, grant thy blessing.
First: Commence sterilization of the surgical servitor through vaporized sacred compounds and heat-based purification.
Second: Attend to the surgical servitor's articulation nodes, scrubbing each with antimicrobial solution and blessed unguents.
Third: Invoke the Omnissiah's grace upon the surgical servitor, that it may serve without contamination.
Fourth: Seal the sterilization with the Rite of Sanctity, rendering the surgical servitor immaculate.

user_request: Can you sanctify the hydraulic press for operation?
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Can you sanctify the hydraulic press for operation?

### TOPIC
hydraulic press operation

### COMPONENT
hydraulic press

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- hydraulic press
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
O Mighty Hydraulic Press, servant of the Omnissiah's will, rise and serve.
First: Purify the hydraulic press through inspection of fluid conduits and seal integrity verification.
Second: Chant the Litany of Pressure whilst charging the hydraulic press with blessed oleic sacrament.
Third: Commence the operation of the hydraulic press with gradual invocation, testing its response to command.
Fourth: Monitor the hydraulic press throughout its labor, that it may crush and compress in perfect harmony.

user_request: The conveyor belt demands guidance for initialization
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
The conveyor belt demands guidance for initialization

### TOPIC
conveyor belt initialization

### COMPONENT
conveyor belt

### OPERATION
initialization

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- conveyor belt
- initialization

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed is the endless cycle, O Omnissiah, grant motion to this servant.
First: Prepare the conveyor belt through lubrication of its rollers and tensional alignment verification.
Second: Invoke the initialization protocol upon the conveyor belt, beginning with manual rotation and sensory confirmation.
Third: Accelerate the conveyor belt to nominal velocity whilst reciting the Mantra of Perpetual Motion.
Fourth: Stabilize the conveyor belt's operation and seal its function with the Sign of the Eternal Wheel.

user_request: The lasgun demands guidance for power cell insertion
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
The lasgun demands guidance for power cell insertion

### TOPIC
lasgun power cell insertion

### COMPONENT
lasgun

### OPERATION
power cell insertion

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- lasgun
- power cell insertion

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed instrument of the Emperor's fury, attend this rite of communion.
First: Prepare the lasgun's receptacle through careful cleaning and alignment verification by calipers and sight.
Second: Intone the Prayer of Resonance whilst positioning the lasgun for power cell insertion with reverent precision.
Third: Complete the power cell insertion into the lasgun's chamber with deliberate care, confirming the blessed luminous response.
Fourth: Sanctify the lasgun once more, that its righteous beam may never falter.

user_request: My coolant leak is failing during repair — help
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
My coolant leak is failing during repair — help

### TOPIC
coolant leak repair

### COMPONENT
coolant leak

### OPERATION
repair

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- coolant leak
- repair

### PRAYER
prayer:
O Omnissiah, grant succor to this afflicted mechanism, sealed by coolant leak.
First: Isolate the coolant leak through careful inspection and thermal imaging to locate the breach.
Second: Commence repair of the coolant leak by application of polymerized sealant and reinforced patching compounds.
Third: Test the repair upon the coolant leak through pressurization and observation for continued seepage.
Fourth: Consecrate the repaired system anew, that coolant may flow eternal without loss.

user_request: The corrosion demands guidance for treatment
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
The corrosion demands guidance for treatment

### TOPIC
corrosion treatment

### COMPONENT
corrosion

### OPERATION
treatment

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- corrosion
- treatment

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed Omnissiah, grant us dominion over rust and decay.
First: Survey the corrosion with sacred instruments, measuring its depth and cataloguing affected surfaces.
Second: Commence treatment of the corrosion through mechanical abrasion and application of inhibitory compounds.
Third: Continue treatment upon the corrosion with electrochemical neutralization and protective coating deposition.
Fourth: Seal the treatment with blessed oils, that corrosion may trouble this mechanism no longer.

user_request: Emergency rite: flamer promethium requires feed
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: flamer promethium requires feed

### TOPIC
flamer promethium feed

### COMPONENT
flamer promethium

### OPERATION
feed

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- flamer promethium
- feed

### PRAYER
prayer:
O Sacred Flame of the Emperor's Wrath, receive thy blessed sustenance.
First: Prepare the flamer promethium through careful measurement and verification of purity by spectrometric analysis.
Second: Direct the feed of flamer promethium into the weapon's reservoir with reverent precision and care.
Third: Invoke the flamer promethium's ignition through the Mantra of Combustion, confirming the blessed conflagration.
Fourth: Seal the feed mechanism, that holy fire may consume the Emperor's enemies.

user_request: Prayer for operation of the quality control scanning
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Prayer for operation of the quality control scanning

### TOPIC
quality control scanning

### COMPONENT
quality control scanning

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- quality control scanning
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed be the quality control scanning, divine instrument of the Omnissiah's scrutiny.
First: Activate the quality control scanning with reverent supplication, invoking the Machine Spirit within.
Second: Calibrate the quality control scanning through precise liturgical adjustment and blessed oils upon its sensors.
Third: Conduct the operation with steadfast devotion, scanning each component for corruption and deviation from the Omnissiah's perfect designs.
Fourth: Document all findings in the sacred ledgers, that the operation may be recorded in the eternal archives of the Adeptus Mechanicus.
